insights: The market shows resilience with the current 7-day average (1368) trending above the 30-day average (1340), suggesting a slow but steady expansion.
Unicorn-tier companies are demonstrating consistent hiring stability, acting as the primary anchor for volume while FAANG+ roles show signs of contraction.
Data/ML and Infrastructure roles are exhibiting higher volatility but positive growth momentum, indicating a strategic shift toward specialized technical talent over generalist roles.
